news.title: Trump’s approval rating hits second-term low among his Latino voters, though many still approve
news.summary_en: About two-thirds of Latino Trump voters (66%) approve of his job performance. That’s down 27 percentage points since the start of his second term.

news.title: A majority of Americans say the country’s best years are behind us
news.summary_en: Americans are also much more pessimistic (44%) than optimistic (28%) when asked to think about what things will be like in the U.S. 50 years from now.

news.title: What Americans think it takes to be a good news consumer
news.summary_en: One of the most common things Americans associate with being a good news consumer is a sense of skepticism or discernment.

news.title: How Americans Feel About Religion’s Influence in Government and Public Life
news.summary_en: A growing share of U.S. adults say religion is gaining influence, but most still want churches to stay out of politics, a 2026 survey finds.
